metadata.scheme_name: Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Govt Adarsh ​​Residential Schools (SC) Scheme

raw_data.details: The “Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Government Adarsh Residential Schools (SC)” scheme was launched by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to expand access to quality residential education for scheduled caste (SC) students in standards 9th to 12th. Under this scheme, eligible SC students receive free boarding, lodging, textbooks, uniforms, meals, and additional support services to enhance academic participation.
raw_data.benefits: Free Services Provided:Board and lodging, meals, textbooks, uniforms, and waterStudy materials, mid‐day meals, and other academic supportRation card, PH identity card, and other entitlements, as applicable
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant should be a student. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat. The applicant must be currently studying in standard 9th to 12th in a recognized institution. The applicant must have passed the previous annual exam with at least 50% marks (or a government-sanctioned exemption). NOTE: Returning students must have passed with at least a second class with 50% to be considered for re-admission.
raw_data.application_process:
Online
Step 01: The eligible applicant may visit the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal: [https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/)
Step 02: On the home page, under the tab ‘Citizen Login’, click on New User ‘[Please Register Here](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/Registration.aspx)’.
Step 03: Enter your Full Name as per Aadhaar Card, Gender, Date of Birth, Aadhaar Card Number, Email ID, Caste etc. and then click on ‘Register’.
Step 04: After successful registration, the applicants can login through their User ID and Password.
Step 05: Now, click on ‘User Profile’ to update your profile.
Step 06: Fill in all the mandatory information and then click on ‘Update’.
Step 07: After updating the profile successfully, select the scheme appearing on the home page; an application form will open.
Step 08: Fill in all the mandatory details in the application form and upload all the relevant documents.
Step 09: Now agree with the terms & conditions and click on ‘Save Application’.
Step 10: Submit the application form and take out the print of the application for future reference. The applicant can note down the application number to track the application status by logging into the portal using their User ID and Password.[User Manual](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/HelpManual/Citizen-HelpManual.pdf)
raw_data.documents_required: Aadhaar CardCaste CertificateMark sheetPassport-size PhotosRation CardBank Passbook/Cancelled ChequeCertificate by Civil SurgeonOther Mark Sheets/Last Year Mark sheetPH Identity CardSchool Leaving

The scheme aims to expand access to quality residential education for scheduled caste (SC) students in standards 9th to 12th. Under this scheme, eligible SC students receive free boarding, lodging, textbooks, uniforms, meals, and additional support services to enhance academic participation. BenefitsFree Services Provided:Board and lodging, meals, textbooks, uniforms, and waterStudy materials, mid‐day meals, and other academic supportRation card, PH identity card, and other entitlements, as applicableEligibilityThe applicant should be a student. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat. The applicant must be currently studying in standard 9th to 12th in a recognized institution. The applicant must have passed the previous annual exam with at least 50% marks (or a government-sanctioned exemption). NOTE: Returning students must have passed with at least a second class with 50% to be considered for re-admission. Application ProcessOnlineStep 01: The eligible applicant may visit the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal: [https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/)Step 02: On the home page, under the tab ‘Citizen Login’, click on New User ‘[Please Register Here](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/Registration.aspx)’. Step 03: Enter your Full Name as per Aadhaar Card, Gender, Date of Birth, Aadhaar Card Number, Email ID, Caste etc. and then click on ‘Register’. Step 04: After successful registration, the applicants can login through their User ID and Password. Step 05: Now, click on ‘User Profile’ to update your profile. Step 06: Fill in all the mandatory information and then click on ‘Update’. Step 07: After updating the profile successfully, select the scheme appearing on the home page; an application form will open. Step 08: Fill in all the mandatory details in the application form and upload all the relevant documents. Step 09: Now agree with the terms & conditions and click on ‘Save Application’. Step 10: Submit the application form and take out the print of the application for future reference. The applicant can note down the application number to track the application status by logging into the portal using their User ID and Password.[User Manual](https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in/HelpManual/Citizen-HelpManual.pdf) Documents RequiredAadhaar CardCaste CertificateMark sheetPassport-size PhotosRation CardBank Passbook/Cancelled ChequeCertificate by Civil SurgeonOther Mark Sheets/Last Year Mark sheetPH Identity CardSchool LeavingFrequently Asked QuestionsWho can apply for the scheme? Only Scheduled Caste (SC) students studying in Std. 9 to 12 in Gujarat are eligible. Is there any income limit to apply? No, there is no family or individual income limit for this scheme. What benefits do students receive under this scheme? Students receive free boarding, meals, textbooks, uniforms, and other academic support. How can I apply for this scheme? Applications must be submitted online via esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in. Is there a cost to apply? No, the application process is completely free of cost. What documents are required to apply? Documents like Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, mark sheet, passport-size photo, and residence proof are required. Are students from outside Gujarat eligible? No, only students domiciled in Gujarat are eligible. Is distance education allowed under this scheme? No, only students enrolled in regular schools are eligible. What happens if a student violates hostel rules? Admission may be cancelled if students break rules or show misconduct. Where can I find more information? Visit https://sje.gujarat.gov.in or the application portal at https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in. Sources And References[Guidelines](https://mariyojana.gujarat.gov.in/Schemeatoz.aspx)

raw_data.scheme_name: Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Govt Adarsh ​​Residential Schools (SC) Scheme

faqs.question: Who can apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Only Scheduled Caste (SC) students studying in Std. 9 to 12 in Gujarat are eligible.

faqs.question: Is there any income limit to apply?
faqs.answer: No, there is no family or individual income limit for this scheme.

faqs.question: What benefits do students receive under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students receive free boarding, meals, textbooks, uniforms, and other academic support.

faqs.question: How can I apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Applications must be submitted online via esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in.

faqs.question: Is there a cost to apply?
faqs.answer: No, the application process is completely free of cost.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Documents like Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, mark sheet, passport-size photo, and residence proof are required.

faqs.question: Are students from outside Gujarat eligible?
faqs.answer: No, only students domiciled in Gujarat are eligible.

faqs.question: Is distance education allowed under this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only students enrolled in regular schools are eligible.

faqs.question: What happens if a student violates hostel rules?
faqs.answer: Admission may be cancelled if students break rules or show misconduct.

faqs.question: Where can I find more information?
faqs.answer: Visit https://sje.gujarat.gov.in or the application portal at https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in.
